"[31] [Appended, 09:37:54] [1] he user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency. This request is for SOMEONE ELSE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. NO ONE is trapped. The person in need IS NOT injured. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected. Two-way text with the user is now available."
